title: EMD Serono may trim R&D workforce by up to 70

title: BIO 2026: As ADCs evolve, experts say ‘wellness’ needs to be factored into patient survival
snippet: As antibody-drug conjugates advance and move into earlier lines of treatment, drug developers have to build gentler therapies that don’t just extend survival but improve it.

title: AB Science ends 3 studies in multiple sclerosis, other immune conditions
snippet: The trials, which were testing the tyrosine kinase inhibitor masitinib, had previously been paused. AB Science’s decision not to resume them was a matter of prioritization, not safety, the biotech said.

title: FDA posts new rejection letters days after confirming pause
snippet: The FDA last week confirmed that it would suspend the release of complete response letters pending the resolution of a citizen petition from an unnamed pharma company. Nevertheless, 14 new CRLs are now available on the agency’s portal.

title: The FDA needs a patient-first vision—and adcomms with patients at the table
snippet: FDA’s rare disease decisions are strongest when the patient community has a voice in advisory committee decisions.

title: Welcome To The ‘Show Me’ Era: Sapphire Ventures’ Anders Ranum On What Separates Winning AI Startups From The Rest
Tumor heterogeneity: development, mechanisms, and therapeutic implications.
snippet: Tumor heterogeneity is a fundamental hallmark of cancer that drives progression, metastasis and therapeutic resistance. This diversity originates from persistent genomic instability, dynamic clonal evolution, and cancer stem cell plasticity, which are further amplified through complex crosstalk within the tumor microenvironment. While conventional therapies...

title: Bioinformatics analysis of PFKFB family in pan-cancer and preliminary exploration of PFKFB4 in bladder cancer.
snippet: The phosphofructokinase-fructose bisphosphatases (PFKFBs) family is critical in tumors and the immune system. Nevertheless, the involvement of the PFKFB family genes in the immune microenvironment and prognosis of tumor patients has not been investigated using genomic and transcriptomic analyses.
